name: oap-reminder
description: Create, list, complete, and manage personal reminders with due dates, recurrence, and places. Use for requests like 'remind me to call the dentist Friday', 'what reminders are due today', 'next time I go to the store remind me to buy milk', 'I'm heading to Costco — any reminders?'. Supports one-time and recurring reminders (daily, weekly, monthly, yearly) and place-based reminders that surface when the user says they're going somewhere.

input.description: JSON with 'action' to select operation and additional parameters. Actions: 'due' (DEFAULT — reminders due today or overdue; supports 'after' and 'before' params for date ranges like 'this week' or 'next 30 days'), 'place' (reminders for a location — use when user says 'I'm going to [place]' or 'heading to [place]'), 'create' (new reminder — set 'place' for location-based, 'due_date' for time-based, or both), 'list' (admin search across ALL reminders including future — only use when explicitly asked to see everything), 'complete' (mark done by id OR title — use title when the user refers to a reminder by name), 'delete' (remove by id or title), 'get' (fetch by id or title), 'cleanup' (purge old completed).

action.description: Operation: 'due' (today's and overdue — use by default), 'place' (reminders for a location), 'create', 'list' (all reminders — only when asked for everything), 'complete', 'delete', 'get', 'cleanup'

title.description: Reminder title. Required for create. Also used by complete/delete/get to find a reminder by name when id is not known.

due_date.description: Due date in YYYY-MM-DD format. For 'list' action, filters to reminders on that exact date. For 'create', sets the due date.

before.description: End date for 'due' action range query (YYYY-MM-DD, inclusive). Use with 'after' for date ranges like 'this week' or 'next 7 days'.

after.description: Start date for 'due' action range query (YYYY-MM-DD, inclusive). E.g. after=today + before=end-of-week for 'reminders due this week'.

due_time.description: Due time in HH:MM format or '5 PM' style

place.description: Location for place-based reminders (e.g. 'store', 'costco', 'Michelle\'s'). Use with 'create' to set a place trigger, or with 'place' action to query reminders for a location.

id.description: Reminder ID (for complete, delete, get). Not needed if title is provided.

status.description: Filter by status for list: 'pending' or 'completed'

output.description: JSON reminder object with id, title, notes, due_date, due_time, recurring, place, status (pending/completed), created_at, completed_at. List/due/place actions return {reminders: [...], total: N}.

usage: POST /api {"action": "create", "title": "Call dentist", "due_date": "2026-03-10", "due_time": "09:00"} → creates reminder; POST /api {"action": "create", "title": "Buy milk", "place": "store"} → place-based reminder; POST /api {"action": "place", "place": "store"} → reminders for the store; POST /api {"action": "due"} → list today's reminders; POST /api {"action": "complete", "title": "Call dentist"} → mark done by title; POST /api {"action": "complete", "id": 1} → mark done by id
